matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Past and Future Climates is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: This MPhil offers a 10-month programme of advanced study and research into the natural and anthropogenic causes of past, present and future climate variability. The course is intended for students with a strong first degree in in Physical Geography, Earth Science or related fields.
